channel.title: Pages on OrangeEgg1937's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on OrangeEgg1937's Blog

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Biogarphy

A recent computer engineering graduate with experience in embedded systems, programming, and digital logic design, who is looking for an innovative team to create new things, and keep exploring different technologies and get better on my skills.

Education

University/School Date Degree
Hong Kong Community College 2018-2020 Associate in Information Technology
The Chinese University of Hong Kong 2020-2024 B.Eng. in Computer Engineering

Favorite/Outstanding courses

  • Building Web Applications
  • Digital System Design
  • Embedded System
  • VLSI CAD

Job Experience

ASMPT (July 2022-July 2023)

Intern (1-Year)

  • Collaborated with colleagues on various MCU application and software design mainly
  • Provided assistance in circuit design and soldering of circuit boards
  • Debugging hardware board such as using oscilloscope for waveform analysis
  • Proposed an intern project “Time Pressure Dispenser prototype with Ti C2000 MCU”
    • Achieved a base function of dispenser in software part
    • Designed a CLB for Manchester-encoded and decode

Personal Project

Hosting a Personal Blog in Github.io (This page)

  • Utilizing the Hugo framework, hosted at github.io
  • Customizing the style and layout sheets to enhance the overall appearance and user experience
  • Sharing my valuable learning experiences and providing personal feedback through the blog

AR Object placer in Smartphone

  • A simple Android application to place the mode in the AR scenes
  • Implemented the application using Unity AR foundation, using the Raycasts and Plane Detection to accurately position - cts on real-world surfaces
  • Allow users to manipulate the pose, position, and rotation of the placed models

Personal Skills/Experience

Programming Language Related School Courses Project / Courses Work Link
C/C++ OpenGL in Computer Graphic, MCU design and development, ESPRESSO algorithm ESPRESSO (irredundant Step)
Python Raspberry Pi + mediapipe + OpenCV, photomosaic, multimedia application (Online Chatroom) Raspi, photomosaic, Online Chatroom
C# Final Year Project, Developing a Detective Game with Generative AI FYP
Java Android App development Hotel App Prototype
HTML + CSS + JS Responsive Web application design by Bootstrap, React, Node.JS Code
VHDL Design Zedboard program with Xilinx Vivado N/A
